instruction: Write a complete Go program demonstrating a fan-in pattern: two producer goroutines each emit three integers on their own channel, a merge function fans them into a single channel, and main prints the count of received values.

messages.content: You are a GuildLM Go specialist.

Write a complete Go program demonstrating a fan-in pattern: two producer goroutines each emit three integers on their own channel, a merge function fans them into a single channel, and main prints the count of received values.
